supporting.brake_bias_reasoning: Calibrated base: 46.0% | Fuel correction: -0.03% at 44L | Result: 46.0%; +0.8% from trail brake depth p95=0.85; +0.2% for high braking decel p95=2.37g; -0.5% for front braking lock proxy p95=0.082; -0.2% for front brake wheel decel asymmetry p95=15.4 m/s^2; Note: measured hydraulic split 72.2% vs recommended 46.3% (delta +25.9%); Current target -1.0 retained as hardware context only; MC: F/R = 20.6/22.2 mm (ratio 0.93); differs from nominal 1.00 — effective bias may need decrease; Pad: Medium | front-lock evidence shifted brake hardware and migration rearward
supporting.brake_hardware_status: Static brake bias is solved from telemetry; brake target, master cylinders, pad compound, and migration were conservatively seeded from braking evidence.
supporting.diff_reasoning: Base: 28.2 Nm (lat transfer=14093N at peak lat_g=4.13g); +5 Nm for rear power slip p95=0.069; clutch plates=6 | Coast 45 deg (from trail brake depth=0.26); Drive 70 deg (from throttle R^2=0.68) | Lock: coast=62.2% drive=27.2% (preload 7.1% + plates 55.1%)
supporting.tc_reasoning: Baseline: gain=4, slip=3; +1 gain for erratic consistency; +1 slip for rear power slip p95=0.069; +1 gain: TC barely active (0%) but rear slip p95=0.069; +1 slip for high MGU-K torque 317 Nm
supporting.pressure_reasoning: Track temp 23°C → cold adj +2.2 kPa; Front hot 177 kPa → cold 152 kPa; Rear hot 173 kPa → cold 153 kPa
